com.alfredapp.vitor.1password = {
	active count = 1
	path = /Users/brandon/Library/LaunchAgents/com.alfredapp.vitor.1password.plist
	state = running
	program = /usr/bin/osascript
	arguments = {
		/usr/bin/osascript
		-l
		JavaScript
		-e
		function run() { return 1 }
	}
	working directory = /Users/brandon
	stdout path = /Users/brandon/Library/Logs/1password.out.log
	stderr path = /Users/brandon/Library/Logs/1password.err.log
	pid = 5931
	last exit code = 0
}
